feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Edit output email address in RFQ
entry.content:
We have a request from a customer to change the email address for bidders in the RFQ. It will only take the main email address from the supplier master, and the output details where you can see which email it's being sent to is not editable.

Is there a way to make this field editable, so that the email can be changed on the RFQ?

entry.title: Default Client Certificate Renewal in S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: While trying to renew certificate to client default in communication system getting error as local host not suggested for communication system .

entry.title: Best Practices for Data Migration in a Carve-Out from S/4HANA On-Prem to S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

I’m currently working with a customer who is performing a carve-out, moving from their legacy S/4HANA On-Premise system to S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. As part of this project, they are facing challenges in identifying the relevant data tables for migration and pinpointing where exactly the necessary data resides in their existing system. I’d like to reach out to this community for any best practices or lessons learned from similar carve-out scenarios.

  • The new system will be based on S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, so we are focusing on a clean and efficient transition.
  • The legacy system is S/4HANA On-Premise, with years of data accumulated. The customer is unsure about the best approach to identify and extract only the necessary data for migration. 

Challenges:


  1. 1. Identifying relevant tables: The customer is unsure about which tables to migrate and how to locate the key tables in their On-Premise system.
    2. Data relevance: There’s some confusion around how to extract **only the relevant data**, without transferring unnecessary historical data.
    3. Table mapping for migration tools: Aligning On-Prem tables with SAP Migration Cockpit templates and the standard migration objects available for the Cloud edition has also proven to be challenging.

Key Questions:

  • What best practices exist for identifying and mapping the critical tables in S/4HANA On-Prem for a carve-out scenario?
  • Are there any efficient methodologies or tools that can help pinpoint relevant data and ensure it aligns with the S/4HANA Cloud public edition data structure?
  • How do you ensure the customer extracts only the required data, avoiding clutter or excessive historical records? 

I’d appreciate any advice, strategies, or best practices that you have found effective in your own experience—particularly in scenarios where S/4HANA On-Prem is being transitioned to the public Cloud edition. We want to ensure that our data migration is as clean and efficient as possible.

Thanks in advance for your input!

Best regards,
Yannick

entry.title: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HANA memor in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are implementing SAP S4HANA Public Cloud at one of our clients.

We found that, our cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HANA memory consumption is exceeded than the subscribed.

We are not sure how this GB is exceeded as we are still in development phase.

Please refer enclosed image.

 

Requesting to experts if they can throw some light on it.

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: Define Company Code successor Create Company issues
entry.content:
The successor to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 100529 "Define Company Code" has limited functionality in comparison to the new version 106040 "Create Company".

It is not possible to edit the company code details in the new SSCUI. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Entity - SAP RAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?"

Thanks,

entry.title: Can s/4 public cloud be hosted in any hyperscaler?
How to create SO10 standard text in S4HANA public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

how to create standard text in S4HANA public cloud and how to use it in labels design ?

Thanks and Regards,

Gowthami Gunji

entry.title: Capacity Availability Field Does not Available
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We have a question, so we try to connect the production with the plant maintenance. So when the work center under maintenance order, the production order won't be able to be created or there are any warning message.

We already following the step on this link : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/block-production-work-center-during-maintenance-order/qaq-p/7739061

But our issue are , we cannot find the field for capacity availability check in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

This is the picture from old SAP :

And this one is from SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition :

Any suggestion that we need to try?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Confirmation of prerequisites for implementing cash concentration
entry.content:
What are the prerequisites for performing cash concentration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Simplified invoices in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition through a SOAP service?
entry.content: I am looking for an equivalent to the SAP Business ByDesign web service "PointOfSaleTransactionProcessingPointOfSaleTransactionIn" in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. I found the following: "Retail Merchandise Management - Point Of Sale Transaction Data Integration (SAP_COM_0652)", but it is not selectable in the Communication Arrangements app. Is there any alternative to access this functionality?

entry.title: Adapt UI in Customizing Tenant
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

When we want to extend fields in an app we normally have to adapt UI. 

This would mean that we have to see the screen of the app itself for us to specifically place this field, but this has to be done in Customizing Tenant.

Some data customizations are hard to do in Customizing System due to the lack of data and have to do a lot of configuration.

Is there a better way to adapt UI or it really has to be done this way?  

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales orders for semi-finished products cannot run out of planned orders after running MRP
entry.content: Now there is a sales order for semi-finished products. I want to run the planned order through the sales order, but the display interface in MD04 is empty, but the planned order can be run through MD61. I checked that the master data MRP type is PD and policy is 70. Check that the plan category in the sales order is CP. I don't know what the problem is now. I hope you experts can help me look at this problem

entry.title: Pop up when using Post goods receipt for Purchasing document
entry.content:
Hi All

We recently activated Scope Item 5HN which allows you to post Synchronous goods receipt and avoid the Inbound delivery. Now the App: Post Inbound delivery had one advantage compared to the other process. It would give you a Pop-up that displayed the text from the PO (Header Note) when you entered the PO.  

Now 

Now my Question is: Is possible to create this Pop-up for the App: Post goods Receipt for Purchasing Document? 

The App itself is very good but sadly it does not display any texts that are either in the Header of the PO oder the Item level texts. i think maybe it is possible to create a custom logic but my skills are not advanced enough for that. maybe i am missing something obvious.

entry.title: Custom Field Type - Code list Accepting free text which is not maintained in Code Values
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
Good day!

We have created a custom field with type as “Code List”. Currently, users can select from the predefined code values using F4 help, but the system also allows them to enter free text that is not part of these predefined values.

Now business wants  to restrict the entry of any free text in this custom field.
please let us know if anyone encountered and resolved a similar issue?

Thanks and Regards,
Ankit

entry.title: How to find out BADIs of Post General Journal Entries APP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Environments:
SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408
and
SAP BTP, ABAP environment 2408

I want to post some data to add-on table(BTP ABAP environment) by custom API
when I post a new journal entry with APP - Post General Journal Entries(S/4HANA Cloud Public).

There are any BAdis I can use with developer extensibility to do that?
or how to find each BAdis implement to which app?

kindly thanks for help.

entry.title: Specific Identification of Costs in S4H Public Cloud for Serial/Batch-Managed Items
entry.content: Is there no specific identification of costs S4 HANA Public Cloud?  Our clients (mostly from SAP Business One) who are transitioning to S4 have their costs managed through Serial and Batch which is a basic configuration in Business One.  Now, they want to have this same requirement in S4 since their items are not interchangeable and managed by serial numbers (chassis/engine).  Since the items are not interchangeable though they have the same item codes, they want the costs specifically identified also to the serial number.

entry.title: Credit Check Rule
entry.content:
Dear experts,

May I know what is the function of these Credit Check Rules in Manage Credit Account - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?
1. 01 (Default - All Checks Active (Stat. Credit Limit))
2. 02 (Credit Limit Check Only (Statistical))
3. 03 (Credit Limit Check Only (Dynamic))

Thank you.

entry.title: How to add External SSL Certificate in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We want to add an external SSL certificate in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Please share steps or documentation.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Error
entry.content:
Hello all, we are trying to upload a template but in the migration cockpit, in the preparation step for Accounts receivable template but we are getting the following error:

Amount not allowed. No local curr. type configured for company code

We check the local currency type but it seems everything ok, but maybe we are missing something.

Regards!!
